creator: nemysis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Joseph S. Atkinson

Do you approve this changes and to you wish to give maintianer ship
to Anton Sayetsky?



Anton Sayetsky please send svn diff, yours diff is not usable good

use only

svn co svn://svn.FreeBSD.org/ports/head /usr/ports

and use

svn checkout svn://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head/graphics/pngcrush pngcrush

then make Changes and

svn diff > ../pngcrush.diff

-- 
Best regards,
Rusmir Dusko
